description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow for C/C++ CI that covers multiple build configurations, testing, and deployment. The workflow should trigger on push to master, develop, and tags starting with 'v*', as well as on pull requests to any branch. It should include jobs for code coverage, building and testing on various platforms (ubuntu-18.04, with different compilers and configurations), and deploying to different environments (e.g., PX4 SITL, Docker, and various Linux distributions).
